title: Marketing-sourced deals close 27% faster this week
anchor: Current week wins average 38 days to close versus the prior 11-week average of 52 days.
body: Current week wins average 38 days to close versus the prior 11-week average of 52 days. Mid-market represents 7 of 9 current-week wins.
trace: Marketing-sourced deal velocity signal shows significant compression in current week versus trailing period.

title: April mid-market SQLs run 50% above quarterly average
anchor: Month-to-date SQLs hit 147 against the Q1 monthly average of 98.
connect: ABM acceptance rate sits at 61% versus 42% for non-ABM leads.
body: Month-to-date SQLs hit 147 against the Q1 monthly average of 98. ABM acceptance rate sits at 61% versus 42% for non-ABM leads.
trace: Mid-market SQL volume spike in April with notable ABM performance differential.

title: Paid social flips channel mix versus last quarter
anchor: Q2 paid social pipeline creation at $620K outpaces paid search at $380K.
connect: Q1 ran the opposite direction with search at $720K and social at $410K.
body: Q2 paid social pipeline creation at $620K outpaces paid search at $380K. Q1 ran the opposite direction with search at $720K and social at $410K.
trace: Clear channel performance reversal between Q1 and Q2 favoring social over search.

title: Enterprise win rate jumps to 31% in Q2
anchor: Current quarter enterprise closed deals show 8 wins from 26 opportunities.
connect: Trailing four quarters averaged 22% win rate across 180 enterprise deals.
body: Current quarter enterprise closed deals show 8 wins from 26 opportunities. Trailing four quarters averaged 22% win rate across 180 enterprise deals.
trace: Enterprise win rate acceleration in Q2 versus historical baseline.

title: Event pipeline velocity compressed by 35% this quarter
anchor: Q1 event-sourced wins close at 46 days versus Q4's 72-day average.
connect: SaaS Connect drove 12 of the 17 Q1 event wins.
body: Q1 event-sourced wins close at 46 days versus Q4's 72-day average. SaaS Connect drove 12 of the 17 Q1 event wins.
trace: Event-sourced deal velocity improvement with SaaS Connect as primary contributor.

title: Branded search volume doubles over six weeks
anchor: Weekly branded search climbed from 1000 to 1921 with growth in every period.
connect: Total growth of 92% spans the six-week window ending April 19.
body: Weekly branded search climbed from 1000 to 1921 with growth in every period. Total growth of 92% spans the six-week window ending April 19.
trace: Consistent branded search acceleration across six consecutive weekly periods.

title: Direct traffic crosses organic search for the first time
anchor: April traffic mix shows direct at 42% versus organic at 37%.
connect: The crossover happened on April 15 and held through month end.
body: April traffic mix shows direct at 42% versus organic at 37%. The crossover happened on April 15 and held through month end.
trace: Historical shift in traffic composition with direct overtaking organic search.

title: Brand mentions outpace top competitor by 52%
anchor: April Atlas mentions hit 1840 versus Beacon Systems at 1210.
connect: Analyst coverage increased to 9 mentions in 14 days from 6 in the prior month.
body: April Atlas mentions hit 1840 versus Beacon Systems at 1210. Analyst coverage increased to 9 mentions in 14 days from 6 in the prior month.
trace: Brand mention leadership versus primary competitor with analyst coverage acceleration.

title: Q2 digital spend paces $84K under plan
anchor: Actual spend through April 23 sits at $256K versus $340K planned.
connect: Two event budget reallocations total $84K from SaaS Connect and Signal Summit.
body: Actual spend through April 23 sits at $256K versus $340K planned. Two event budget reallocations total $84K from SaaS Connect and Signal Summit.
trace: Digital spend underpacing with budget shifted to event channels.

title: Mid-market fintech wins dominate closed deals
anchor: Last 60 days show 8 fintech wins from 12 total mid-market closes.
connect: All 12 mid-market wins run on Snowflake plus dbt infrastructure.
body: Last 60 days show 8 fintech wins from 12 total mid-market closes. All 12 mid-market wins run on Snowflake plus dbt infrastructure.
trace: Strong sector and tech stack correlation in recent mid-market closed deals.

title: Atlas Insights reference opt-in leads product line
anchor: Reference participation sits at 75% for Insights versus 70% for Workflow.
connect: Connect product lags at 29% opt-in rate across the customer base.
body: Reference participation sits at 75% for Insights versus 70% for Workflow. Connect product lags at 29% opt-in rate across the customer base.
trace: Reference willingness varies significantly across product lines.

title: SDR capacity creates breathing room for the first time
anchor: Current week capacity at 210 exceeds inbound volume of 142 leads.
connect: Trailing month averaged capacity at 206 with volume at 201.
body: Current week capacity at 210 exceeds inbound volume of 142 leads. Trailing month averaged capacity at 206 with volume at 201.
trace: SDR capacity-to-demand ratio shows improvement versus recent monthly average.

title: Target accounts generate 5+ high-intent events this week
anchor: Three target accounts crossed the high-intent threshold currently.
connect: Two of those three sit on the Named Accounts list of 50 priority companies.
body: Three target accounts crossed the high-intent threshold currently. Two of those three sit on the Named Accounts list of 50 priority companies.
trace: Target account intent signal concentration with Named Account list overlap.

title: Atlas Assist launch campaign locks Friday
anchor: May 8 product launch sits two weeks out with campaign status ready.
connect: Campaign calendar locks on April 24 for coordinated activation.
body: May 8 product launch sits two weeks out with campaign status ready. Campaign calendar locks on April 24 for coordinated activation.

title: Forrester and G2 drive April analyst attention

connect: Single Gartner mention rounds out the recent analyst coverage mix.
body: Last 14 days show 3 Forrester mentions and 3 G2 mentions from 9 total. Single Gartner mention rounds out the recent analyst coverage mix.

title: Enterprise deal value climbs 32% in Q2

connect: Win rate improvement to 31% accompanies the higher deal values.
body: Current quarter enterprise wins average $187K versus trailing baseline of $142K. Win rate improvement to 31% accompanies the higher deal values.
